calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Validation/Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Brenda Fields.
Christopher Land, Esq. for Plaintiff: Barry russell Collins.
Order waiving appearance of live witness is in the court file.
After hearing the evidence presented, and considered of the filed declaration, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc., as follows:
Prejudgment Interest $119.74
Costs $399.40, for a total of $519.11 and post-judgment interest.
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
